'''Exchange negotiators''' were a type of [[Stun baton/Legends|energy baton]] used by the criminal organization known as the [[Exchange]]. They were presumably used to "negotiate" prices with buyers, or perhaps the name was just a cover-up of the weapon's real use. The negotiator delivered a more potent shock than other stun batons.

==Behind the scenes==
The [[Meetra Surik|Jedi Exile]] has the possibility of obtaining this weapon. However, it works mainly like an ordinary energy baton.

{{Weapon-stub}}

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic II: The Sith Lords]]'' {{1st}}
